title: Cobblemon Interface: Modded
description: Mod support for the Cobblemon Interface resourcepack
body:
A complementary resourcepack to [Cobblemon Interface](https://modrinth.com/project/cobblemon-interface) that makes many mods interface and sounds fit the [Cobblemon](https://modrinth.com/mod/cobblemon) mod aesthetics.

### Mod Support

### Recommendations

[![](https://vinnystalck.gitlab.io/minecraft-badges/badges/respackopts/cozy-recommends.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts)

⭐️: Highly Recommended |
📁: Resourcepack |
🛠️: Mod

- 🛠️⭐️ [Respackopts](https://modrinth.com/mod/respackopts): Allows you to customize various aspects of the resourcepack in-game.
- 🛠️ **[Raised](https://modrinth.com/mod/raised) Mod**: Moves the hotbar so it doesn't crop the texture;
- 📁 **[Fancy Item Renders](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fancy-item-renders) Resource Pack**: Tilts item displays so that items that have long textures (swords for example) does't look off with the rounded item slots.

### Minecraft Pack Version Compatibility
[Minecraft pack format](https://minecraft.wiki/w/Pack_format)

| Minecraft Pack | Cobblemon Interface |
|---------------:|:--------------------|
| 9              | <= v0.7             |
| 15             | >= v0.8             |
| 34             | >= v1.4             |

### Credits

This project includes a modified version of the [cobblemon tooltips](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/poketips) resourcepack.
